text: @hermes goal for sprint 1 is core models, tenancy, migrations, seeders, and tests. Plan tickets + assign to OpenClaw before any code.
Sprint plan generated. Decomposed into Issue 1 (migrations), Issue 2 (models & scopes), Issue 3 (auth), Issue 4 (seeder), and Issue 5 (api tests). Assigning core items to @openclaw.
@hermes goal for sprint 2 is Vite React frontend setup, Axios Sanctum integration, Login page, Sidebar, Dashboard, TicketList and TicketDetails views. Plan and assign to OpenClaw.
Sprint 2 plan generated. Decomposed into Issue 6 (Vite bootstrap), Issue 7 (auth pages), Issue 8 (dashboard cards), Issue 9 (sidebar), and Issue 10 (ticket details/replies). Assigning to @openclaw.
